agency: Immigration Services Agency (出入国在留管理庁) — form download
nameEn: HSP Point Calculation Table — as of 1 year before the application date
nameJa: 高度専門職ポイント計算表（永住許可申請の1年前の時点のもの）
conditionNote: Submit if you have NOT received the official HSP notification (item #18). Calculate using the current point table but as of 1 year before the application date.
noteEn: Calculate using the current point table but as of 1 year before the application date. Must show 80+ points. Note: if 70–79 points at this point in time, see ISA website for alternative pathway.
noteJa: 現在のポイント計算表に基づき永住許可申請の1年前の時点で計算したもの。80点以上であることが必要。70点以上80点未満の場合は出入国在留管理庁ホームページ参照。
